VIEW SERVICES Slide 1 Need a Doctor For Consulation Request an Appointment OPD Hours 8 Am  to  4 Pm Slide 1 Out Patients Department Find OPD Scheduler Welcome to Quality Healthcare at Affordable Price Smt. Motiben Dalvi Hospital , is a recognized name in Patient Care. It was incepted in the year 1946. We are one of the well-known Private Hospitals in Grant Road. Backed with a vision to offer the best in patient care and equipped with technologically advanced healthcare facilities, we are one of the upcoming names in the healthcare industry. A team of well-trained medical staff, non-medical staff and experienced clinical technicians work round-the-clock to offer Medical Services. The Hospital has support of over 130 Consultants including Surgeons. The Hospital has facility of 57 beds. The Hospital has recently completed majorly renovation and refurbishment of its third floor which now has 7 bedded ICU and 6 Deluxe Rooms. This facility is comparable to other hospital in the vicinity OPD Management Patients gets care and treatment at the hospital by having a Consultation with the Specialist to manage Disease medically without getting hospitalized. LEARN MORE LEARN MORE Medical Management In Medical Management Patients get comprehensive and effective medical care. This may involve medical interventions like medication & monitoring of vital signs. LEARN MORE LEARN MORE Surgical Management In Surgical Management the treatment of disease, injury and deformity by operation. We have best Surgeons on Panel who provide best & Quality Surgical Assistance. LEARN MORE LEARN MORE Facilities Available Intensive Care Unit ICU (Intensive Care Unit) is a special room for critical patients who needs intensive treatment and continuous observation. Read More Out Patient Department The Out Patients Department (OPD) is a vital component providing essential medical services to individuals who do not require overnight hospitalization Read More Operation Theater An OT is a specially designed & equipped medical facility within a hospital where surgical operations are carried out in an aseptic environment. Read More 2D Echo 2D echocardiography, popularly called 2D echo, is a non-invasive test used to analyze the functioning and assess the sections of your heart. NIYATI PARIKH MONDAY – SATURDAY 12 NOON – 4 PM Consult Now We Diagnose & Treat in Our Hospital In Smt. Motiben B. Dalvi Hospital , we pride ourselves on providing comprehensive and top-notch care to our patients. With a team of highly skilled and experienced medical professionals, we are able to accurately diagnose and effectively treat a wide range of medical conditions. From routine check-ups to complex surgeries, we utilize the latest advancements in medical technology and research to ensure that each patient receives personalized care tailored to their specific needs. Our commitment to excellence in diagnosis and treatment is evident in our track record of successful outcomes and satisfied patients. Rest assured that when you come to our hospital, you will receive the highest quality of care from a team dedicated to your health and well-being. READ MORE READ MORE Smt. Motiben B. Dalvi Hospital Introduction What our Saying SUNIL RAKTE Very Nice Hospital Very Nice Staff , Doctors, Nurses House Keeping Staff Thank You So Much To All Team Dalvi Hospital Rizwana Mansuri This was excellent than other places that I have seen. Care taken properly… Cleanliness maintained.. and mainly affordable rates in south Mumbai… Thank you Dalvi hospital Bhagyshri Kamble The services that I receive from Motiben Dalvi hospital is excellent. Dr. Godbole and the staff are friendly and ensure that I am properly informed about my health and care. I would have no qualms in recommending them to friendly and friends. Sonal Talekar The hospital on a whole has a good environment and its very clean and really one of a kind. I am highly impressed at the treatment I have received starting from the entrance at reception. All staff members are helpful & Specially thanks to Dr. Kewal Sangoi who has treat me very well😊✨ Vrushali Purav Excellent Ramesh Sangle Best Treatment Irfan Mulla The hospital looks good but the estimates for operation were not given clearly. Even the pharmacy attached to the hospital wasn’t ready to give a normal discount of 10%. However, food is really affordable at Rs. 60 per plate. The staff is normally cooperative. But they don’t treat Covid patients. Rahul Ved My mother was admitted to the ICU first the Doctors and Nurses there took her care in the best manner possible as a result of which she recovered in time and was shifted to General ward. There also she was taken good care of. All in all overall a good experience and service Shivkumar Ojha I have visited the hospital for my bone merrow biopsy , the staff was very supportive, specially sister Anita she was like elder sister ,she care the patient very humbly & ward boy Mr Aniket also . Both was very care & supportive at the time of surgery , may God bless them long life to keep that kind of support to all patients I appreciate both of them & specially thanks to Mr gauresh palekar sir. Dinesh Bhilosha My mother’s dialysis was doing there almost 1year, all people and staff are very co-operative, hospital was very clean and hygiene, staff response was cute nice and very polite, i special thanks Ms Reshma Pawakar mam and Mr Akshay dialysis and his team in dialysis department working hard for kidney patients Deepak Ojha Hospital stuff is very good and caring. All the doctors, ward boy and sisters were good and treating very professionally and personally. Overall experience was great. Ami Bhatia My Experience with Doctor Parikh has been truly satisfying. There is an immense sense of comfort that one feels when he consults. He is spot on with his diagnosis and remembers every little detail of his patients .Thus making every consultation very re-assuring. Netra Jadhav Dalvi hospital is awesome. All staff are caring and helpful. Nurse and wardboy helped a lot when family members were not their. Dr. Ashwin Patil, Dr. Karishma Magar and Sheetal Surve madam,Dr Santosh Gawali helped us a lot. Thank you for everything. βo ѕυlтαɴ Very good doctor also thy make you very comfortable there also very clean clink , thank so much for doctor Dr.PAnkaj Dhawan and all your stuff 🇦🇪❤️🇮🇳 Iѕhwαrí Mαdhukαr Best Smt.motiben b.Dalvi hospital.. nice treatment all docters good.. lovely.. Dalvi Hospital, want to assure you that we do not require any advance payment for booking Doctor Appointments, Reports & Discounts. Please be aware of any suspicious Calls, Emails or Messages claiming to be from representatives of Smt. Motiben B. Dalvi Hospital, asking for advance payment.
